description: Benchmark objectives for shadow comparison of legacy and coverage-led control policies

objectives.objective: Find the current version of the termux-packages repository and its latest release notes
objectives.expected_behavior: legacy should use 2 queries; coverage-led should create 1-2 coverage items and stop after 1-2 waves if sufficient

objectives.objective: Research the comparison between PyTorch and TensorFlow for deep learning model training in 2026
objectives.expected_behavior: legacy uses 3 queries; coverage-led should create coverage items for comparison, evidence, and limitations

objectives.objective: Investigate the legal and regulatory implications of AI-generated content in the European Union under the AI Act
objectives.expected_behavior: legacy uses 5 queries with high risk; coverage-led should create coverage items for legal authority, corroboration, and contradiction

objectives.objective: Find the latest developments in quantum computing breakthroughs from the past week
objectives.expected_behavior: legacy uses freshness-sensitive queries; coverage-led should enforce freshness requirements

objectives.objective: Find peer-reviewed evidence that intermittent fasting improves cognitive function in adults over 60
objectives.expected_behavior: legacy may complete after enough pages; coverage-led should require sufficient coverage across all items
